'''鈭歴h-n-h-g''' ('''kashanhegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cycloruthenate|cycloruthenate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cycloruthenate|cycloruthenate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-n-h-g
|-
! Lemma
| kashanhegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishanhegoko|thishanhegoko]] || [[word:jishanhegoko|jishanhegoko]] || [[word:shishanhegoko|shishanhegoko]] || [[word:kishanhegoko|kishanhegoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
